Uses of Class
com.github.scribejava.oidc.OidcSessionState

  • Packages that use OidcSessionState 
    Package Description
    com.github.scribejava.oidc  

    • Uses of OidcSessionState in com.github.scribejava.oidc

      Methods in com.github.scribejava.oidc that return OidcSessionState 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      OidcSessionState OidcService.initSessionState()
      Initializes and saves a new OIDC session state (including state, nonce, and PKCE code verifier).
      OidcSessionState DefaultOidcSessionStateStore.load​(String state)
      Loads the OIDC session state associated with the given state value.
      OidcSessionState OidcSessionStateStore.load​(String state)
      Loads the OIDC session state associated with the given state value.
      Methods in com.github.scribejava.oidc with parameters of type OidcSessionState 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      OAuth2AccessToken OidcService.getAccessToken​(String code, OidcSessionState sessionState)
      Retrieves the access token using authorization code and performs ID Token validation using session state.
      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> OidcService.getAccessTokenAsync​(String code, OidcSessionState sessionState)
      Asynchronously retrieves the access token using authorization code and performs ID Token validation.
      String OidcService.getAuthorizationUrl​(OidcSessionState sessionState)
      Generates the authorization URL using parameters from the provided OIDC session state.
      void DefaultOidcSessionStateStore.save​(OidcSessionState sessionState)
      Saves the given OIDC session state.
      void OidcSessionStateStore.save​(OidcSessionState sessionState)
      Saves the given OIDC session state.
